## createEmptyNotebook() function

Creates an empty NotebookLM notebook, optionally naming it. AppleScript transport only (macOS).

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function createEmptyNotebook(options: CreateNotebookOptions): Promise<NotebookResult>;
```
